nmtranServer.maxNumberOfProblems.description: Controls the maximum number of problems produced by the NMTRAN server.

nmtran.debug.enabled.description: Enable debug logging for NMTRAN extension.

nmtran.debug.logLevel.description: Set the logging level for NMTRAN extension.

nmtran.server.debugPort.description: Debug port for NMTRAN language server.

nmtran.server.timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for language server operations.

nmtran.formatting.indentSize.description: Number of spaces to use for NMTRAN indentation (2 or 4 spaces).

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with NMTRAN
walkthroughs.description: Intelligent language support for NONMEM control streams — learn the key features in 5 minutes.

steps.title: Open a NMTRAN file
steps.description:
The extension activates automatically for `.mod`, `.ctl`, `.lst`, and 17 other extensions.

Open an existing control stream or create a new `.mod` file to see syntax highlighting immediately.

[Open a file](command:workbench.action.files.openFile)

media.altText: Syntax highlighting for an NMTRAN control stream showing control records in distinct colors

steps.title: Hover for inline documentation
steps.description:
Hover over any control record (`$THETA`, `$ESTIMATION`) or parameter reference (`THETA(1)`, `ETA(2)`) to see an explanation inline.

Parameter hovers surface the comment from the matching `$THETA` declaration line.

[Browse NMTRAN reference](https://nmhelp.tingjieguo.com)

media.altText: Hovering over THETA(1) shows its declaration and comment; hovering over $ESTIMATION shows a description

steps.title: Navigate with Go to Definition and Find References
steps.description:
Press `F12` on any `THETA(n)`, `ETA(n)`, or `EPS(n)` to jump to its declaration in `$THETA`, `$OMEGA`, or `$SIGMA`.

Right-click a parameter → **Find All References** to see every usage — useful when auditing or renumbering.

[Trigger Find All References](command:editor.action.referenceSearch.trigger)

media.altText: Peek References panel showing all usages of THETA(1) across the model

steps.title: Catch errors as you type
steps.description:
The extension validates control records and parameter sequences in real time.

- Misspelled records are flagged with a suggested correction (e.g. `$EST` → `$ESTIMATION`).
- Non-sequential parameter indices are reported immediately.
- Press `Ctrl+.` on a flagged record to apply a **Quick Fix** automatically.

> **Tip**: Install [ErrorLens](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=usernamehw.errorlens) to see diagnostics inline on every affected line.

media.altText: An NMTRAN model with real-time diagnostics highlighting errors

steps.title: Insert models with snippets
steps.description:
Type `ADVAN` inside `$SUBROUTINES` and press `Tab` to browse all ADVAN/TRANS subroutine combinations.

More snippets are available for residual error models, baseline models (B1–B4), BQL handling (M3), and mixture models.

Press `Ctrl+Space` anywhere in an NMTRAN file to open the full completion list.

[Trigger suggestions](command:editor.action.triggerSuggest)

media.altText: Typing ADVAN in $SUBROUTINES triggers a list of ADVAN/TRANS combinations; selecting one inserts the snippet

steps.title: Format and configure
steps.description:
Press `Shift+Alt+F` to format the current file. The formatter standardizes indentation inside `$PK`, `$DES`, `$ERROR`, and other code blocks.

Search for `nmtran.formatting.indentSize` in Settings to switch between 2-space and 4-space indentation.

[Open NMTRAN settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%5B%22nmtran%22%5D)

virtualWorkspaces.description: Language features work with virtual workspaces

scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.esbuild: npm run esbuild-base && npm run esbuild-server
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run esbuild-base -- --minify && npm run esbuild-server -- --minify
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run compile && npm test
